markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Resolve a critical SEO issue and align on content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Critical SEO Issue Resolved:** A disabled Webflow sitemap was causing widespread indexing failures. Kris Carter enabled it during the meeting, which should fix the problem.](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Aligned:** Will Watters defined three priorities: consistent terminology, an objective "Metronome's Take" tone, and sourcing information directly on pages.](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [**New AEO Tool Demoed:** Katya Luscomb demoed "Check That," a new tool launching in February that tracks AI visibility against competitors (WithOrb, GetLogro, Maxio, Tabs).](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
  - [**Reporting KPIs Defined:** Katya Luscomb will DM Will Watters for Metronome's KPIs and attribution setup (HubSpot/Salesforce) to enable more strategic reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)

## Topics

### Critical SEO Issue: Sitemap & Indexing

  - [**Problem:** A 404 sitemap error was preventing Google from indexing most site content, causing poor organic visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** Webflow's sitemap feature was disabled.](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [**Resolution:** Kris Carter enabled the sitemap during the call.](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [**Next Step:** Katya Luscomb's technical SEO expert will now re-evaluate the site to confirm the fix and identify any other indexing issues.](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Content Strategy & Quality

  - [**Will Watters' 3 Priorities:**](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
    1.  [**Consistency:** Use similar terminology (e.g., "good, better, best") across pages to improve user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
    2.  [**Tone:** Maintain an objective, informative voice in the "Metronome's Take" section.](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
    3.  [**Sourcing:** Link directly to sources on pages to build credibility and enable verification.](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
  - [**Logo Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
      - [**Current:** Kris Carter sources/creates logos as needed.](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
      - [**Proposed:** GrowthX can source logos and upload them to Airtable for Kris Carter.](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
      - [**Decision:** Kris Carter will continue the current process for now, but may adopt the new workflow if volume increases.](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)

### Performance & Reporting

  - [**Current Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
      - [Only 3 pricing index pages are indexed (Grok, AWS Lambda, main hub).](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
      - [Indexed pages show good session volume but low engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** Engagement is low because CTAs are only at page bottom.](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
      - [**Data Anomaly:** The December traffic spike was due to the Stripe acquisition announcement, not organic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Tool: "Check That"**](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Track how Metronome and competitors appear in LLM responses.](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
      - [**Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
          - [Uses a library of 100k+ pre-built prompts with historical data.](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
          - [Compares brand visibility, citation count, and sentiment.](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
      - [**Competitors to Track:** WithOrb, GetLogro, Maxio, Tabs.](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Katya Luscomb:**](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)
      - [DM Will Watters for Metronome's KPIs and attribution setup (HubSpot/Salesforce).](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)
      - [Add WithOrb, GetLogro, Maxio, and Tabs to the "Check That" tool.](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
      - [Have a technical SEO expert re-evaluate the site post-sitemap fix.](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**Will Watters:**](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)
      - [Provide Metronome's KPIs and attribution setup to Katya Luscomb.](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)
  - [**Kris Carter:**](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
      - [Monitor the sitemap fix and address any remaining indexing issues identified by GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/paxwmUZh8hMBv1K3vWoXjhsukkzm5Ka8?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
